violations.description: EMPLOYEE HYGIENE (5 pts): Kitchen employees noted washing hands in restroom sinks to continue with food handling. This practice was initiated due to the main hand wash lavatory faucet not working.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): The hand washing lavatory automatic faucet was not function at the time of inspection batteries were dead.

EMPLOYEE HYGIENE (5 pts): Employee noted handling food while hands were contaminated and did not wash hands before starting work. Observed employees touching aprons pickinig up trash from floor and handling cell phone before regloving and handling food.

CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored not covered in food dispensing. Observed ice tea dispenser lids in customer beverage station and in the drive thru beverage area not tight fitting.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Pop nozzles and surrounding area not properly maintained.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the establishment noted in need of cleaning. Floors under ice cream equipment in customer dining area and in walk-in-freezer and coolers need more through cleaning. Observed heavy debris build up.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Cups noted being stored on the floor in the dry goods storage area.
